diagnostics.netInfoConnected: Phone is connected to a network
diagnostics.phoneInternetOk: Your phone can reach the internet
diagnostics.phoneInternetFailed: Your phone may not have working internet
diagnostics.discoveryFailed: Discovery service is unreachable (your phone can't find a relay)
diagnostics.relaysUnknown: No relays are known yet. Try again once the discovery service is reachable.
diagnostics.pluginInstalled: Blox AI is installed on your Blox
diagnostics.pluginInstalledHint: AI-driven diagnostics will be available here in a future app version.
diagnostics.pluginNotDetectedHint: It may not be installed, or your Blox firmware may not yet support plugin reporting. You can install it from the Plugin store, or update your Blox firmware if needed.
diagnostics.rawDiagnosticsPluginRequired: When Blox AI is installed, this section will let you fetch your Blox's diagnostic state files and send them to support.
diagnostics.rawDiagnosticsUnavailable: Unavailable until Blox AI is installed
diagnostics.rawDiagnosticsComingSoon: Coming soon — raw state-file dump from your Blox will appear here in a future app version.

chat.ctaTitle: Let Blox AI figure it out
chat.ctaSubtitle: Describe what's wrong in a sentence; Blox AI will run diagnostics and suggest fixes you can approve.
chat.promptPlaceholder: e.g. My Blox seems disconnected; I can't sync from the app.
chat.errorEvent_noTransport: Cannot reach your Blox over LAN or Bluetooth. Make sure your Blox is powered on, connected to the internet, and that your phone is on the same WiFi network — then try again.
chat.shareContext: Share my phone's context with Blox AI
chat.shareContextHint: Sends WiFi / connectivity info to your Blox locally for the AI to use during this session. Stays on your device — not uploaded.
chat.connectingSubtitle: Looking for your Blox on your WiFi network or over Bluetooth. This usually takes a couple of seconds.
chat.endAndRateButton: End session, rate & share with developer
chat.endAndRateHint: Rate the session and (optionally) upload an anonymized copy to the Fula developer team to help improve Blox AI. You'll review the JSON before anything is sent.

approval.tier3HoldHint: Press and hold the button below for 2 seconds to confirm.

sharePhoneContext.title: Share phone context
sharePhoneContext.privacyAssurance: This data stays on your Blox. Nothing is uploaded anywhere else.
sharePhoneContext.preview: This is what will be sent to your Blox:

feedback.title: Did this help?
feedback.subtitle: Your rating stays on your Blox; no automatic upload happens.
feedback.shareHint: Help improve Blox AI — share an anonymized copy of this session. You'll review the JSON before it's uploaded.

uploadTranscript.title: Help improve Blox AI?
uploadTranscript.subtitle: Optionally share this troubleshooting session with us. Your peer ID, IPs, file paths, and Wi-Fi names are stripped on your device before sending. Nothing is uploaded unless you tap Upload below.
uploadTranscript.previewIntro: Exactly this will be sent — review before you tap Upload:

pending.title: While you were away
pending.subtitle: Blox AI ran a self-diagnostic and has {{count}} pending recommendation(s) for you.

quickStart.title: What's wrong?
quickStart.subtitle: Pick the closest scenario and Blox AI will diagnose it.
quickStart.disconnectedSubtitle: App shows the device as offline.
quickStart.notEarningSubtitle: Rewards or pin counts aren't moving.

transportError.connectionLost: Connection lost. Tap to retry over BLE (will start a fresh session).
transportError.bleBusy: BLE is busy with another command. Try LAN HTTP for multi-turn conversations.
transportError.deviceBusy: Blox AI is busy with another session. Please wait a moment and try again.
transportError.recommendationExpired: This recommendation expired. Please re-run the diagnosis.

welcome.title: Hello Functionlander!
welcome.disclaimer: By using this product you agree to the terms and conditions at fx.land/terms, and would not hold Functionland liable for data loss.

connectToWallet.title: Connect To Wallet
connectToWallet.description: App needs notification permission to connect your wallet and perform data sync. Tap allow in the next prompt.

linkPassword.title: Set Identity
linkPassword.warning: Make sure to safeguard this password and the chain you used, it's the key to decrypt your data from new devices
linkPassword.passwordRisk: I understand the risk of losing my password
linkPassword.walletOpen: I already opened my Wallet app before clicking Sign
linkPassword.walletConnectionInProgress: Wallet connection in progress, click to move back to the app
linkPassword.unableToSignWallet: Unable to sign the wallet address!
linkPassword.clearStorageWarning: If you previously used this app with different credentials, you may need to clear app storage to avoid decryption errors.
linkPassword.clearAppStorageMessage: This will open app settings. Tap 'Storage' then 'Clear Data' to remove cached identity. The app will restart after clearing.
linkPassword.storageCleared: Storage cleared - you can now create a new identity

connectToBlox.title: Connect to Blox
connectToBlox.bleFailed: Unable to connect via Bluetooth, trying WiFi...
connectToBlox.hotspotInstructions: - Please turn your Blox on and connect your phone to the Blox's hotspot manually, and turn off mobile data.
connectToBlox.formatInstructions: - Make sure you have internal or external storage attached and format is either 'ext4' or 'vFat'.
connectToBlox.waitForBlueLight: After first boot please wait for 10 minutes until Blox flashes 'light-blue'
connectToBlox.connectedMessage: Now you are connected to Blox. Please wait...

connectToWifi.title: Connect to Wi-Fi
connectToWifi.noNetworksFound: We could not find the available WiFi, please use the button to manually enter the WiFi information.
connectToWifi.lanInstructions: Please connect the LAN Cable to the bottom port of your FxBlox now and click continue when done

setBloxAuthorizer.title: Set Blox Owner
setBloxAuthorizer.description: Adding the Blox App Peer ID as an owner on the Blox
setBloxAuthorizer.networkError: In some cases you need to turn the mobile data off, please make sure the phone is connected to the Blox's Hotspot and mobile data/VPN is off, Then press back and try again please
setBloxAuthorizer.updateNeeded: An update is awaiting a manual restart to be applied. You should unplug and plug back your blox to restart it and then try again.
setBloxAuthorizer.backendUpdate: You should update your blox backend, Please press 'Skip' button and connect it to your Wifi network.
setBloxAuthorizer.storageNeeded: To proceed successfully you need to attach an external storage to the Blox!
setBloxAuthorizer.skipDescription: The Skip is only intended when you are instructed to do so by the support team. Please enter the code given to you:
setBloxAuthorizer.invalidCodeMessage: The code you entered is incorrect. Please contact support if you need assistance.
setBloxAuthorizer.unableToGetProperties: Unable to get the blox properties!

setupComplete.connectPhone: Connect your phone to internet (wifi) to proceed now...
setupComplete.greenLed: Is you blox LED 'green' but you see this message?
setupComplete.internetReminder: Make sure your phone is connected to the internet and then try again
setupComplete.lightBlueLed: Is you blox flashing 'light-blue'? You probably entered wrong wifi password
setupComplete.notReachable: Your Blox is not reachable, seems it is not connected to the internet! Please turn your blox off and then turn it on and make sure it is on Hotspot mode, then try to reconnect the blox to the Wi-Fi
setupComplete.updating: Your blox is updating. Please wait for an hour for the update to complete.
setupComplete.disconnectHotspot: Meanwhile, feel free to disconnect your phone from FxBlox hotspot.
setupComplete.cyanFlashing: If Blox is flashing 'Cyan', it probably means you have entered the wrong password for your wifi. Connect to 'FxBlox' Wifi again and retry.
setupComplete.notConnectedToHotspot: It seems you are no longer connected to Hotspot, check if FxBlox hotspot is still available, if not, blox is already connected to internet and you can go to Home
setupComplete.unableToInitialize: Unable to initialize the fula network! error: {{error}} for fulaIsReady={{fulaIsReady}}

connectToExistingBlox.title: Bloxs in your network
connectToExistingBlox.selectBloxs: Select bloxs you want to add
connectToExistingBlox.peerIdMismatchBrief: This Blox is authorized by a different identity.
connectToExistingBlox.peerIdMismatchHelp:
This Blox's authorizer Peer ID doesn't match your app's Peer ID. You can use the Reset command in Bluetooth Commands to reset the Blox and redo the setup to regain access.

You can claim your earned tokens at any time after the reset, but you will need the current Blox Peer ID as it may change. Copy it before resetting.
connectToExistingBlox.poolPeerIdCopied: Pool Peer ID copied to clipboard

checkConnection.couldntConnectTryAgain: Couldn't connect with {{ssid}}. Please try again.
checkConnection.allDone:
All done
Your device is connected with success!

earningCard.title: Rewards
earningCard.openInWalletInstructions: The claim link has been copied to your clipboard. Open your wallet app, go to the browser/explore section, and paste the URL to claim your rewards.
earningCard.catchUpHint: ⏳ Your claim window is over 6 months old. Tap Claim Rewards to begin catch-up — the first transaction will not pay rewards directly, but is required to advance the window before older rewards become visible.

connectedDevicesCard.title: Connected Devices
connectedDevicesCard.formatWarning: Your blox turns purple for 2 minutes and then reboots automatically. Please do not disturb the format process
connectedDevicesCard.formatConfirmation: Are you sure want to format all connected external blox partitions?
connectedDevicesCard.partitionRequestMessage: The partition request is sent and blox LED turns purple. Please wait 5 minutes as your blox restarts after partitioning

pools.connectWalletMessage: Please connect your wallet and wait for contract initialization
pools.leavePoolInProgress: Pool leave transaction in progress, click to return to the app
pools.confirmTransactionInWallet: Please confirm the transaction in your wallet
pools.leftPoolSuccessMessage: You have successfully left the pool
pools.leavePoolErrorMessage: Unable to leave the pool. Please try again.
pools.transactionRejectedMessage: You rejected the transaction in your wallet
pools.insufficientFundsMessage: You don't have enough funds to complete this transaction
pools.networkErrorMessage: Network connection issue. Please check your connection and try again.

bleDeviceSelection.title: Select Blox Device
bleDeviceSelection.subtitle: Multiple Blox devices found nearby. Select the one you want to connect to.
